3004020.name: Creepy Tales
3004020.description:
Creepy Tales is a cooperative horror and survival game for 1 to 4 players. The players take on the roles of orphans trapped in an eerie orphanage run by a priest possessed by a malevolent entity. Navigate through terrifying challenges, uncover dark secrets, and work together to defeat the possessed priest. Survive the horrors, save your friends, and escape the nightmare!

- Online co-op for 1 to 4 players
Take control of up to 4 orphans in this unique cooperative experience, where you need to work together to stop the possessed priest determined to hunt you.

- Challenging gameplay
No game of Creepy Tales is the same as another. To stop the evil, you will need a focused team and perfect execution. A single game can take up to 15 minutes.
3004020.supported_languages: 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 英语
